_comment: The temptations deck — classic warehouse ambushes. A rotating subset appears on the live trip screen. tease = shown in-store; roast = fired at the verdict if you gave in. Savage by design.

temptations.name: KS ORG PNT BTR ×3
temptations.tease: Six pounds of peanut butter. Six.
temptations.roast: Six pounds of peanut butter. I've seen things in this parking lot, but never this.

temptations.name: LED PATIO STRNG
temptations.roast: Patio lights for a residence that has no patio. Bold. Delusional, but bold.

temptations.name: RTSSRE CHKN
temptations.roast: The chicken is $4.99. The chicken is never the problem. You know what the problem is.

temptations.name: KRKLND HOODIE XXL
temptations.roast: You came for eggs and left dressed as the store. Total identity collapse in aisle 9.

temptations.name: 55IN TCL TV
temptations.roast: A television. You made eye contact with a wall of them and lost. They play that rotisserie ad on loop for a reason.

temptations.name: GUMMI BEARS 6LB
temptations.tease: That's 41 days of regret at serving size.
temptations.roast: Six pounds of gummy bears. At the recommended serving size that's 41 consecutive days of regret, and we both know it won't take 41 days.

temptations.name: INFLTBL KAYAK 2P
temptations.roast: THE KAYAK. The prophecy is fulfilled. Every warehouse shopper buys one eventually — nobody thought it would be you. Today.

temptations.name: MASSAGE GUN PRO
temptations.tease: Sore from carrying the last impulse buy?
temptations.roast: A massage gun, to recover from the workout of pushing a cart full of things you didn't plan to buy. The snake eats its tail.

temptations.name: CROISSANT 12CT
temptations.tease: Math gets hard near the bakery.
temptations.roast: A dozen croissants. You planned zero croissants. The bakery section remains undefeated in league history.

temptations.name: WAGYU FLAT IRON
temptations.roast: Wagyu. On a Tuesday. For no occasion. The occasion was that it was there and so were you.

temptations.name: AIR FRYER XL 8QT
temptations.roast: A third air fryer. Your counter is now a small appliance museum with a gift shop problem.

temptations.name: XMAS INFLTBL 9FT
temptations.tease: It is not even close to December.
temptations.roast: A nine-foot inflatable snowman, purchased in the summer. A literal snowman to commemorate the one on your scorecard.

temptations.name: KS DRESS SHIRT 2PK
temptations.roast: Warehouse dress shirts. You will wear one to an interview and the interviewer will be wearing the same one. Costco sells futures now.

temptations.name: GIANT BEAR 53IN
temptations.tease: Where will it live? Be honest.
temptations.roast: A bear the size of a middle schooler. It doesn't fit in the cart. It didn't fit in the plan. It will not fit in your life.

temptations.name: PROTEIN PWDR 6LB
temptations.tease: The gym membership expired in March.
temptations.roast: Six pounds of protein powder to sit beside the other six pounds of protein powder. The industry term is a bulk bulk.
